error_boundary_subtitle: An unexpected condition occurred. Recent changes may require reloading the app.
error_corrupt_file: PDF file is corrupt or invalid
error_focus_failed: Could not focus on the input field
error_focus_script_failed: Failed to focus AI input field
error_button_not_found: Send button not found. Try re-picking selectors.
error_input_not_found: AI input field not found. Try reloading the page.
error_webview_not_ready: AI window is not ready. Open the AI tab and try again.
error_pdf_load: Failed to load PDF. Please try again.
error_script_failed: Failed to input text into AI
error_selector_repick_required: Selectors no longer match the page. Open the AI tab and pick them again.
error_submit_not_ready: The attachment is still processing. Wait a moment and try again.
error_submit_ready_script_failed: Failed to prepare attachment readiness check.
error_send_failed: Failed to send text. Make sure AI page is loaded.
error_browser_not_found: No supported browser found. Please install Google Chrome or Chromium.
error_login_timeout: Login timed out. Please complete sign-in and try again.
error_challenge_required: Google verification challenge detected. Please complete verification in the browser and retry.
error_login_cancelled: Login window was closed before completion.
error_login_verification_failed: Login completed but session could not be verified in app.
error_gws_disabled: Google AI web apps are disabled. Enable them from settings.
error_restricted_location: Cannot load files from this location
browser_fallback_description: This app is designed to run only inside Electron or a desktop environment so it can access the file system and local integrations. Browser preview is not supported.
error_api_chat_unavailable: API Chat not available in this environment
error_pdf_moved: This PDF may have been moved or deleted. Choose a new location to continue.
